products.name: Chocolate Berry Cheesecake
products.description: A decadent cheesecake built on a deep, crumbly dark chocolate crust and crowned with a lavish arrangement of plump fresh strawberries and blueberries dusted in powdered sugar. The contrast between the intense cocoa base and the bright, juicy berries makes this as breathtaking to look at as it is to taste.

products.name: Frosted Carrot Cake
products.description: Warmly spiced, incredibly moist carrot cake blanketed in wave-piped cream cheese frosting — rich, tangy, and impossibly smooth. Adorned with plump blueberries, toasted walnut crumbles, jewel-like dried cranberries, and fresh rosemary sprigs for a finish that is both rustic and beautifully refined.

products.name: Red Velvet Berry Celebration Cake
products.description: Silky cream cheese frosting is edged with a crown of delicate piped rosettes and a vivid red velvet crumb centre. Fresh strawberries, plump blueberries, and golden physalis berries create a dramatic jewel-toned topping, while the rich, velvety cocoa layers beneath make every single slice utterly unforgettable.

products.name: Classic Strawberry Cheesecake
products.description: A luxuriously smooth cream cheese filling nestled on a buttery golden crust, blanketed edge to edge with a generous, glistening layer of freshly sliced strawberries in a sweet glaze. Clean, elegant, and utterly satisfying — the definitive strawberry cheesecake for those who appreciate quality over complexity.

products.name: Gold-Crowned Chocolate Berry Cake
products.description: An intensely rich chocolate cake enveloped in deeply dark, velvety chocolate buttercream, each swirl hand-piped with lush precision. Crowned with gold-leafed strawberries, fresh blueberries, and fragrant mint — a luxurious combination of deep cocoa, fresh fruit, and edible gold that genuinely stops the room.

products.name: Strawberry Crown Cream Cake
products.description: Ethereally light cake coated in clouds of smooth whipped cream, with an elegant piped border framing a glorious centrepiece of tightly arranged fresh strawberries kissed with delicate gold leaf. The contrast of pristine ivory frosting against vibrant scarlet berries is pure, effortless visual poetry.

products.name: Coconut Berry Celebration Cake
products.description: A delicate coconut-infused cake adorned with piped cream rosettes, fresh strawberries, blueberries, and shimmering gold leaf flakes, elegantly finished with a personalised ribbon and custom name board. Every element is thoughtfully crafted to make your celebration feel genuinely one-of-a-kind — custom lettering and ribbons available upon request.

products.name: Rustic Carrot Cream Cake
products.description: A beautifully unpretentious carrot cake with an exposed golden edge and a billowing topping of hand-piped cream cheese frosting waves. Scattered with fresh blueberries, toasted walnuts, dried cranberries, and delicate rosemary — warmly rustic, elegantly garnished, and deeply delicious from first bite to last.

products.name: Artisan Mini Fruit Cakes — Box of 6
products.description: Charming individual cakes topped with hand-piped cream rosettes, fresh blueberries, a vibrant yellow blossom, and toasted nuts — each one a tiny, thoughtfully crafted masterpiece. Baked from a tender spiced base and boxed beautifully, they make a stunning dessert table addition or a heartfelt gift for someone very special.

products.name: Coconut Buttercream Garden Sheet Cake
products.description: An extraordinary large-format celebration cake bordered by an immaculate garden of sage green and ivory buttercream rosettes, golden pearl accents, and hand-placed white butterflies. The luscious, textured coconut centre is the perfect canvas for custom lettering in sparkling gold — a true showstopper for any milestone or gathering.

products.name: Coconut Daisy Cream Cake
products.description: Pure, radiant elegance — a cloud-white coconut cake encircled by fluted cream rosettes and adorned with cheerful fresh yellow daisies and glistening gold pearl accents. The textured snow-white top and delicate floral wreath give this cake an effortless, garden-party charm that is perfect for any joyful occasion.

products.name: Blooming Butterfly Celebration Cake
products.description: An absolutely breathtaking creation — every inch blanketed in a riot of hand-piped buttercream blooms in soft pinks, purples, blues, and peaches, studded with shimmering gold and coral spheres. Spectacular hand-crafted butterflies take flight across the surface, making this a true work of edible art for life's grandest, most unforgettable celebrations.

products.name: Blueberry Cream Cheesecake
products.description: A silky smooth cheesecake on a golden biscuit base, framed by a scalloped border of hand-piped whipped cream and piled sky-high with an abundant mountain of fresh, glossy blueberries in a rich compote. Scattered with gold leaf and rosemary, it strikes the perfect balance between deeply indulgent and beautifully refined.

products.name: Naked Red Velvet Cake
products.description: Bold and unapologetically beautiful — this rustic naked-style red velvet lets its deep, jewel-red layers speak for themselves, finished with a crown of cream cheese rosettes, fresh strawberries, blueberries, and a bright yellow daisy. The exposed sides reveal a stunning crimson crumb, making every slice as dramatic to cut as it is delicious to eat.

products.name: Rose Garden Birthday Cake
products.description: A breathtaking explosion of hand-piped buttercream roses and blooms in a vibrant ombré of deep red, coral, and blush pink, covering every inch of this magnificent cake. Pearl accents glimmer between the flowers, and the effect is nothing short of wearable art — for birthdays that truly deserve something extraordinary.
